subject: Welcome to Dapaue
body:
Hi David,
Welcome to the Archives. Here's the orientation file you requested. Do let me know if you need anything more.

Regards,
Kara
Please review the attached security guidelines. Pay particular attention to Section 4: Data Sovereignty and the Non-Disclosure of Trial Participant status.
subject: Security Notice

body:
David, 
welcome aboard. You're taking over the Batch 400 series logs. Don't worry about the deletions in the system—some files are 'scrubbed' by Management for legal shielding. Just focus on the raw data entry. If you see anything odd, just flag it to me first, alright?

- Mitchell
subject: Morning, New Guy

body:
Hi David, 
I heard you asking about the 'mechanical hitch' in that subject's gait in the lobby. We call them 'Limpers' in Scenario Dev. It’s just a hardware glitch, nothing for Data Entry to worry about. Try not to stare next time; it makes the subjects self-conscious.
subject: RE: Observations in the Lobby

body:
David, 
I'm a bit worried. My brother's bionic arm is starting to feel 'heavy'—he says it's like the AI is trying to move for him before he even thinks it. You see the logs for the neural maps, right? Is that normal for Class-B trials? Please don't tell anyone I asked.
subject: Private: Question about the trials

body:
Dear Regina, 
I was reconciling the Batch 402 logs and noticed Subject #992 is listed as 'Withdrawn' but the retrieval log shows a Class-B post-mortem recovery on the same day. I'm unable to edit this discrepancy. Is there a specific protocol for 'Rapid Harvest' cases I should be using?
subject: Log Discrepancy: Batch 402

body: Mr. Parker, administrative errors are to be reported via the automated ticket system, not my direct inbox. The subject in question was a 'Write-off' under Class-C protocol. Do not attempt to access those medical records again. Your clearance level does not cover post-mortem summaries.
subject: RE: Log Discrepancy: Batch 402

body:
Hey David, 
I've got a Class-A extraction scheduled for tonight in the slums. The mercs are being difficult about the 'data chip' integrity. Can you send over the latest neural map for the target? It makes the harvest much cleaner if we know where the AI nested the consciousness backup.
subject: Class-A Retrieval tonight

body: Chen, have you noticed how many people just... stop... at the bus stop outside? I checked the timing. It's exactly four minutes. They look like they're sleeping on their feet. Is there a collection node hidden there? I keep finding these 'Data Bursts' in the traffic logs that match the bus schedule.
subject: The Bus Stop

body: It has come to my attention that you have been querying 'Collection Nodes' and 'Social Engineering' protocols. These are classified Executive-level strategic assets. This is your first and final warning regarding 'curiosity' in the archives. Stick to the data entry, Mr. Parker.
subject: Compliance Warning #1

body:
David, 
I think I've found a pattern. The biological rejection isn't random. The enzyme levels spike exactly 48 hours after they go near the 'firewall' areas in the tech-slums. It's like the body is reacting to the AI trying to 're-sync' the brain map. If they're using placebos, these people are basically walking towards a coma.
subject: Off-the-record: Enzyme Anomalies

body:
David, 
I noticed you've been quite stressed lately. Your keystroke cadence has changed, and you're spending longer than average on the 'Deceased Assets' files. Why don't you pop by my office for a chat tomorrow morning? Let's talk about 'organisational malaise.'
subject: Wellness Check-in

body:
Mitchell, 
someone has been in my desk. My blue notebook is gone. It had all my notes on the Class-A extraction orders. I’m scared. I think someone is watching my screen through the Neuralink. If I don't come in tomorrow, please check the 'Archive 7' backup. I hid something there.
subject: URGENT - I'm being followed

body:
Mr. Parker, 
please report to the Chief of Staff's office immediately for a mandatory security briefing regarding your 'Archive 7' access. Do not bring your personal devices. A security escort has been dispatched to your workstation.
subject: Mandatory Meeting: Office of the Director

body: System Alert: User 'D_PARKER' has been flagged for 'Immediate Transition.' Account access is now restricted to 'Read Only' under protocol Class-A Extraction. All files are being diverted to Senior Policy Advisor Young.
subject: TERMINATION OF ACCESS
